_fetch_method: GET /events/{event_id}/markets/?limit=300  (name= param is BROKEN, always use limit+client-side filter)
_timing: Markets captured pre-kickoff; some markets suspended near kickoff
liquidity_context: Materially reduced vs FRA-SWE: ALL player props (anytime goalscorer, score/assist, player SOT) were illiquid (no bid+offer present). Main match-level markets were liquid but some suspended near kickoff.

full_time_result.note: RULE8 fires: draw=34.25% >> 25% threshold. Highest draw probability of any knockout match this stage.

goals_over_under_2_5.note: Q4 direct — strong Under signal, low-scoring match expected

highest_scoring_half.note: Q2 direct — Second Half contract = 0.3978. Equal at 32.75% very high (consistent with low goal total)

mexico_SOT_over_under_3_5.note: Used to fit lambda_MEX_SOT via scipy brentq

ecuador_SOT_over_under_2_5.note: Used to fit lambda_ECU_SOT via scipy brentq

corners_over_under_8_5.note: Q10 direct — trusted at 0.40 despite model suggesting 6.2 expected corners (market higher than ESPN data implied)

penalty.spread_note: Widest spread of any liquid market: bid=0.2083, offer=0.3077. Used raw mid.

any_player_sent_off.note: Used in compound formula for Q14 check (penalty OR red card) — not asked directly in this match's questions

halftime_result.note: Used for context on Q12 (HT ahead) — not a direct question

goal_1_time_bracket.note: Q13 cross-validation — briefly liquid then suspended. Used alongside time-window scaling.

mexico_goals_ou.note: Only one liquid MEX goals line — used as primary lambda_MEX_goals anchor

ecuador_goals_ou.note: Two ECU goals lines — used to triangulate lambda_ECU_goals

first_half_goals_ou_0_5.note: Implied P(at least 1 goal in 1H). Used as cross-check for Q13 (goal before break ≈ Q13)

player_markets.note: Materially different from FRA-SWE where all 4 target players had genuine bid/offer markets. MEX-ECU required full model-based estimation for Q1 and Q5.

rule8_trigger.note: Draw=34.25% is the highest draw probability of any knockout match this stage. RULE8 mandates all comparison props shaded 65/35 toward model+0.50 blend.
